svg.title: CSV Explorer — architecture diagram and fix plan
svg.desc: Architecture layers and prioritized fix list for the CSV Explorer multi-chain indexer
svg.text: CSV Explorer — architecture + fix plan
UI (Dioxus/WASM)
API (Axum)
Indexer (csv-explorer-indexer)
Storage (SQLite / sqlx)
Shared (csv-explorer-shared + csv-adapter-core)
Fix plan — high → low priority
Cargo.toml root — add [workspace] + [workspace.dependencies] (all .workspace = true refs fail without it)
rpc_manager.rs — RpcManager::get_client() returns Client::new() ignoring auth; use Client::builder().default_headers().build()
sync.rs — SyncCoordinator::new() takes Vec<Box<dyn ChainIndexer>> but start() needs Arc for task spawning; wrap at construction
indexer/Cargo.toml — add sha3 = "0.10" for real keccak256 (ethereum.rs won't compile without it)
advanced_proofs.rs — AdvancedProofRepository::init() never called; tables don't exist; every enhanced insert panics
sync.rs — start_block priority inverted: config always wins over DB; use db_block first, config second, 0 last
Bitcoin fetch_block — /block-height/{N} returns hash string not txids; fix: text() → GET /block/{hash}/txids → loop GET /tx/{id}
Bitcoin index_seals — involves_relevant_address always false (placeholder); decode scriptpubkey_address and check HashSet
Ethereum event sigs — RIGHT_MINTED_SIG contains 'g' (invalid hex); replace all 4 with keccak256("EventName(types)") via sha3
Ethereum fetch_block — eth_getBlockByNumber does not return logs; use eth_getLogs with topic filter instead
Ethereum parse_right_from_log — owner set to contract address (log.address); read from topics[3] (indexed owner param)
Solana get_chain_tip — getSlot returns plain u64; result.get("slot") always None → slot always 0; use result.as_u64()
sync.rs process_block — calls process_block then index_* again: 7x RPC fetches per block; remove process_block, use tokio::join!
sync.rs reindex_from — from_block parameter silently dropped; pass to sync_chain_from_block(chain_id, from_block)
Bitcoin CSV magic — &protocol_id[0..4] != b"CSV-" wrong for hash-based tags; use actual protocol tag from csv-adapter-core
sync.rs concurrency — all chains sync serially in single while loop despite concurrency config; spawn JoinSet per poll cycle
Bitcoin fetch_block — one HTTP call per tx (O(N) RPC); use GET /block/{hash}/txs (returns batch of 25) to reduce calls
Solana get_transactions_for_slot — getBlock params missing encoding/transactionDetails; skipped slots not gracefully handled
All chains — get_latest_synced_block() hardcoded Ok(0); inject SyncRepository or pass latest block as argument
RpcManager — no retry / circuit-breaker; add exponential backoff + auto-failover via get_healthy_endpoint()
Metrics — init_metrics() registers counters but no HTTP server exposes /metrics; wire axum route in API crate
Schema — db.rs checks single table to skip migrations; adopt sqlx migrate with numbered .sql migration files
Ethereum index_contracts — returns static address list not block-scanned; use eth_getLogs ContractDeployed topic
ChainIndexer::detect_commitment_scheme — ignores &[u8] input; parse actual tx bytes via csv-adapter-core types
